description_long: This is a two-story school building with a flat roof and a modern, utilitarian design. The facade features large rectangular windows arranged in a grid pattern, allowing ample natural light into the classrooms. The main structure is accompanied by two smaller outbuildings, likely serving as utility or storage spaces, and is enclosed by wooden fencing. A prominent cylindrical structure, possibly a water tank or rooftop feature, is visible on one side of the building. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, contrasting with the gray and white elements of the roof and windows. The overall layout suggests a compact urban school with functional outdoor areas and secure perimeters.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story school building with large grid windows, beige walls, and two smaller outbuildings, all enclosed by wooden fencing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large grid windows, and both outbuildings with the wooden fence enclosing the property.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain beige wall, the cylindrical rooftop structure, and the fenced outdoor area with utility outbuildings.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the cylindrical rooftop feature, a single large window, and the connection between the main building and the fenced area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arrangement of the outbuildings, the wooden fencing, and the flat roof layout.
